creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
This builds fine on my tinderbox and installs on my local machine with
no problems, but I'm curious:  this port seems to install just the
serif fonts.  I've used Libertine on Linux systems and there is a sans
serif as well (and a monospace, IIRC).  The website displays the sans
serif fonts.  It would be nice to have the rest of the fonts too.

Thanks for doing this!

-- 
Chess Griffin
GPG Public Key:  0x0C7558C3
http://www.chessgriffin.com
